title: stewartia villosa var. serrata
intro: Stewartia villosa var. serrata, also known as Szechuan stewartia, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, characterized by its showy white flowers and serrated leaves. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to exhibit potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Stewartia villosa var. serrata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant protection against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and processed into teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional Chinese medicine.
